publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-03-26 23:06:00 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, publications, awards, course materials, and biographical materials.
did.abstract: Correspondence, subject files, clippings, photographs, honors and awards, memorabilia, academic writing, and other papers pertaining to the personal life and professional career of Daniel Sisler.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Agricultural Resources and Managerial Economics, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, subject files, clippings, photographs, honors and awards, memorabilia, academic writing, and other papers pertaining to the personal life and professional career of Daniel Sisler.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Daniel G. Sisler papers, #21-1-2825. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Agricultural economics -- Study and teaching.
Agricultural resources -- Study and teaching.
Agriculture -- Study and teaching.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Faculty.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes, diplomas, certificates, clippings and yearbooks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes scouting merit badges.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes letters between family members.1

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes reunion book, correspondence and photo; also disability correspondence incl. "Line of Duty Investigation".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes many black and white photos, postcards, memorabilia; letter of appreciation; maps.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes black and white photos (Colorado), personal notebook, instructions, clippings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence with Veterans Admin about disability/blindness, and graduate agricultural studies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence about finding jobs with blindness, Cornell alumni newsletters, clippings.

did.unittitle: Letters from Dan's friends and students

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes article in Cornell Alumni News.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes wedding photo, various letters and pamphlets.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes one card.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes family photographs throughout lifetime.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes humor, articles, Edgerton Career Teaching Award, dept. newsletters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 1993 Teaching Award, reunion booklet, dept. correspondence, newsletters.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes collection of humorous articles and anecdotes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence to encourage blind student in Argentina.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Setting up fund to finance grad assistantship.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 1982 front page article and 1989 commemorative issue recounting 1969 student dissent.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Looseleaf notebook in binder with Braille graphs produced by Dr. Sisler and used to learn fundamental, economic principles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prelims and notes for Ag Ec 50, 100, 150.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Final exams for Ag Ec 100, Ag Ec 150.

did.unittitle: Ag Ec 150 - Great Plains Wheat Master
Ag Ec 150 - The Corn Belt Master
Ag Ec 150 - Rural NY State's Ag Districts Master
Ag Ec 150 - Ag of the Empire Master
Ag Ec 150 - Regions of the US Master
Ag Ec 150 - California Grape Growers Story Master
Ag Ec 150 - Grazing and Irrigated Crops Crops Master
Ag Ec 150 - Agriculture in the Communist Giants
Ag Ec 100 - Full Year Sample Lectures (1)
Ag Ec 100 - Full Year Sample Lectures (2)
Ag Ec 100 Course Syllabus and Materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Intro to Global Economic Issues syllabus; course packet; comparative advantage problem set.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes syllabus and "Take Note" lecture notes for each week of semester.

did.unittitle: Introduction to Global Issues of Agricultural Economics

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Prof. Sisler's book of readings for Ag Ec 100

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Research Methods in Ag Economics.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: All of the following Ag 717 folders were taped together originally.

did.unittitle: Ag Ec 717 - 83:2 List of Important References and Topics
Ag Ec 717 - 83:7 Excerpts from Ferber and Verdorn
Ag Ec 717 - 83:8 The All Too Human Enterprise Called Science.
Ag Ec 717 - Philosophy and Scientific Methods
Ag Ec 717 - 83:12 Abstract from MS Thesis in Ag Econ

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Award winning theses"

did.unittitle: Ag Ec 717 - Basic Economic Concepts and their Measurement
Ag Ec 717 Sampling Concepts and Methods
Ag Ec 717 Tomek AJAE Article, Waugh Article

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence before and during Mr Rojas time at Cornell under Prof Sisler.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes dept. correspondence about Prof Sisler's advisee, plus PhD of Mr. Ashraf. Note on folder says: "First graduate student Dr. Sisler had!"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence between Prof Sisler and Jan Low, dept. info regarding PhD status. Note on folder says: "Typical Sisler PhD".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence between Prof Sisler and Jan Low, dept. info regarding PhD status. Note on folder says: "Typical Sisler PhD".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Student acknowledgements of Dr. Sisler in theses.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes much international correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes much international correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes review of reward system for teachers; several reports on instruction - evaluation, recognition, professionalism.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes articles, book chapters, reports written by Daniel G. Sisler.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes articles, book chapters, reports written by Daniel G. Sisler.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes articles, book chapters, reports written by Daniel G. Sisler.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes articles, book chapters, reports written by Daniel G. Sisler.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes articles, book chapters, reports written by Daniel G. Sisler.

did.unittitle: Ag Policy, Econ Development and Nutritional Status of Children in Nepal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes completed manuscript of research paper.

did.unittitle: The Whole Food Situation - What is the US Role?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes completed manuscript and graphs.

did.unittitle: Rubber or Rice? The Dilemma of Many Developing Nations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes completed article manuscript. Co-authored with David Blandford.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes manuscript for symposium paper. Co-authored with Barclay G. Jones.

did.unittitle: Thesis: Direct Production Payments in the Feed-Grain-Livestock Sector of American Agriculture

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound thesis.

did.unittitle: CIIFAD (Cornell Institute for International Food and Agricultural Development)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes trip expenses and correspondence for CIIFAD.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes proposal to establish and fund CIIFAD, draft of mission statement, related research and correspondence about seminars.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes travel preparations, correspondence, program proposals and trip report for Uganda trip.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Wooden plaque: "Dan and Carol Sisler Pacesetter".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Fold out presentation case, one side describing Dr. Sisler's achievements, the other containing honorary Doctor of Agriculture.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Wooden plaque, "Award for Excellence in College and University Teaching in the Food and Agricultural Sciences."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Award mounted in glass and wood.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Certificate, Cornell, awarded by Council for Advancement and Support of Education.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Housed in 2 overlapping folders for protection.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Wooden plaque awarded by College of Agriculture.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Wooden plaque: "In Appreciation for Service to American/World Agriculture. National Association of County Agricultural Agents, Somerset NJ."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Award mounted in glass and wood, in brown box: "In recognition of a career of dedicated teaching and counseling of students" in CALS.

did.unittitle: Program for the Visit of Professors to the Republic of China

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Program for the visit of Professors of Cornell University to the Republic of China for the Inauguration of the 8th President and Vice President of the Republic of China." Spiral bound pamphlet, 4 x 6".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brown guest book housed in a Hallmark box; inscribed "Guests of Dan Sisler". No occasion noted.

did.unittitle: Book: Distinguished Teachers on Effective Teaching

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Editor, Peter G. Beidler.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes official awards correspondence, letters of congratulations, invitations to lecture, personal correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes official awards correspondence, letters of congratulations, invitations to lecture, personal correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes 1977 "Old MastersProgram" correspondence, schedule. Also, Honorary Doctorate Commencement booklets; official CU photo.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes CV, biographical info, photo, authored reports.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes CV, biographical info, photo, authored reports.
